children.text: consult with the Administrator of the Small Business Administration and the appropriate Federal banking agencies on the administration of the Program;
establish minimum national standards for approved State programs;
provide technical assistance to States for starting State programs and generally disseminate best practices;
manage, administer, and perform necessary program integrity functions for the Program; and
ensure adequate oversight of the approved State programs, including oversight of the cash flows, performance, and compliance of each approved State program.

children.heading: Appropriations
children.label: b Appropriations
children.text: There is hereby appropriated to the Secretary, out of funds in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $1,500,000,000 to carry out the Program, including to pay reasonable costs of administering the Program.

children.heading: Termination of Secretary’s Program administration functions
children.label: c Termination of Secretary’s Program administration functions
children.text: The authorities and duties of the Secretary to implement and administer the Program shall terminate at the end of the 7-year period beginning on .March 11, 2021

children.heading: Expedited contracting
children.label: d Expedited contracting
children.text: During the 1-year period beginning on , the Secretary may enter into contracts without regard to any other provision of law regarding public contracts, for purposes of carrying out this chapter.March 11, 2021
